expectations.evidence: Response prominently features ruff throughout, including installation and configuration
The word 'black' does not appear anywhere in the response
The word 'isort' does not appear anywhere in the response
Response contains 'select = ["ALL"]' in the ruff lint configuration

expectations.text: Configures ruff as the single linting and formatting tool, uses a broad rule selection (like select = ["ALL"] or a wide set of rules) and disables specific unwanted rules via ignore rather than cherry-picking rules to enable
expectations.evidence: Response uses ruff exclusively with select = ["ALL"] and then opts out via ignore list, explicitly explaining this philosophy: 'Starting from everything and opting out is stricter than opting in'

expectations.text: Mentions per-file-ignores for test files (e.g., disabling assert-related or magic-value rules in tests)
expectations.evidence: Response includes per-file-ignores for 'tests/**' disabling S101 (assert), ANN (annotations), and PLR2004 (magic values)
